title: Solutions
description: End-to-end technology solutions for defense, aerospace, rail, telecom, and industrial automation — spanning hardware selection, system integration, and lifecycle support.

items.title: Military & Aerospace
items.subtitle: Defense-Grade Computing
items.description: Rugged VPX/VME boards and signal processing platforms purpose-built for precision strike, C2, surveillance, and unmanned systems in the most demanding operational environments.

items.title: 철도 교통
items.subtitle: SIL4 Safety Systems
items.description: TÜV SÜD SIL4 certified HIMA ControlSafe™ platforms for CBTC, interlocking, and train control — delivering the highest safety integrity levels in rail signaling.

items.title: 산업 자동화
items.subtitle: Industrial-Grade Platforms
items.description: Fanless industrial PCs, network appliances, and IoT platforms for factory automation, process control, semiconductor manufacturing, and quality inspection.

items.title: Telecom & Networking
items.subtitle: 네트워크 인프라
items.description: Intel/AMD-based network appliances for firewall, VPN, UTM, and load balancing — along with high-performance NIC adapters for data center and telecom infrastructure.

items.title: Sensor Modeling & Simulation
items.subtitle: OKTAL-SE Solutions
items.description: High-fidelity EO/IR/RF sensor simulation from OKTAL-SE for Hardware-In-the-Loop, Man-In-the-Loop, and training environments across defense and aerospace programs.

items.title: 고성능 컴퓨팅
items.subtitle: GPU & Compute Platforms
items.description: High-density GPU servers and PCIe expansion systems for machine learning, financial analysis, military applications, medical imaging, and scientific research.

items.title: Radar Processing & Display
items.subtitle: Cambridge Pixel Solutions
items.description: High-performance radar scan conversion, target tracking, and display solutions from Cambridge Pixel — SPx Server, HPx acquisition cards, and integrated radar visualization systems.

items.title: Industrial PCs & Fanless Systems
items.subtitle: ACE-IPC Series
items.description: Boxtype, rackmount, server, desktop, wall-mount, and panel PCs for 24/7 industrial operation — fanless designs, wide temperature, and KC/ISO certified.
